title: phyllanthus harmandii
intro: Phyllanthus harmandii, also known as Huang Bai, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. These benefits include reducing oxidative stress, improving liver function, and potentially alleviating symptoms of certain diseases such as hepatitis and diabetes. In traditional Chinese medicine, Phyllanthus harmandii is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder, and its herbal preparations may also be formulated into capsules or tablets for convenience and standardized dosing.
